Q06.title: 幾何圖形辨識
Q06.questionText: 請問在右方的雪人圖案中，沒有使用到下列哪一種圖形？
Q06.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 280' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><ellipse cx='150' cy='195' rx='85' ry='60' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='150' cy='95' r='45' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2.5'/><rect x='120' y='25' width='60' height='20' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2.5'/><rect x='110' y='45' width='80' height='10' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2.5'/><circle cx='132' cy='80' r='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='134' cy='80' r='3' fill='#1e293b'/><circle cx='168' cy='80' r='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='170' cy='80' r='3' fill='#1e293b'/><polygon points='150,90 140,105 160,105' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M 130 115 Q 150 130 170 115' fill='none' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='150' cy='155' r='7' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='150' cy='185' r='7' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='150' cy='215' r='7' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='75' y1='165' x2='30' y2='135' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='30' y1='135' x2='10' y2='125' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='30' y1='135' x2='20' y2='105' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='30' y1='135' x2='15' y2='155' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='225' y1='165' x2='270' y2='135' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='270' y1='135' x2='290' y2='125' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='270' y1='135' x2='280' y2='105' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='270' y1='135' x2='285' y2='155' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：逐一比對圖形特徵
steps.content:
1. 頭部、眼睛與鈕扣是完美的圓形。
2. 身體是橫向扁寬的橢圓形。
3. 鼻子是向上尖的三角形。
4. 帽子是由兩個長寬不相等的矩形 (長方形) 所組成。
(手臂與嘴巴則是單純的線條)

steps.title: 步驟二：找出缺失的形狀
steps.content:
把所有部位都檢查過一遍後，我們發現整張圖裡面，完全沒有出現四個邊都一樣長的「正方形」。
最終答案為 正方形，選擇 (D)。

Q07.title: 數列規律與計數
Q07.questionText: 小伊從 20 開始數數，每次增加 2：20、22、24 ... 等等。請問她數到的第十個數是多少？
Q07.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 500 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><defs><marker id='arrow' viewBox='0 0 10 10' refX='8' refY='5' markerWidth='4' markerHeight='4' orient='auto'><path d='M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z' fill='#0ea5e9'/></marker></defs><g font-size='20' font-weight='bold' text-anchor='middle'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='22' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='50' y='57' fill='#1e293b'>20</text><circle cx='140' cy='50' r='22' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='140' y='57' fill='#1e293b'>22</text><circle cx='230' cy='50' r='22' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='230' y='57' fill='#1e293b'>24</text><circle cx='320' cy='50' r='22' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='320' y='57' fill='#1e293b'>26</text><circle cx='410' cy='50' r='22' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='410' y='57' fill='#1e293b'>28</text><path d='M 80 50 Q 95 35 110 50' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/><text x='95' y='32' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>+2</text><path d='M 170 50 Q 185 35 200 50' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/><text x='185' y='32' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>+2</text><path d='M 260 50 Q 275 35 290 50' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/><text x='275' y='32' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>+2</text><path d='M 350 50 Q 365 35 380 50' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/><text x='365' y='32' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>+2</text><path d='M 440 50 Q 480 50 480 100 Q 480 150 440 150' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><circle cx='410' cy='150' r='22' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='410' y='157' fill='#1e293b'>30</text><circle cx='320' cy='150' r='22' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='320' y='157' fill='#1e293b'>32</text><circle cx='230' cy='150' r='22' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='230' y='157' fill='#1e293b'>34</text><circle cx='140' cy='150' r='22' fill='#f8fafc' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='140' y='157' fill='#1e293b'>36</text><circle cx='50' cy='150' r='26' fill='#fef2f2' stroke='#ef4444' stroke-width='4'/><text x='50' y='157' fill='#ef4444'>38</text><text x='50' y='195' font-size='16' fill='#ef4444'>第十個數</text><path d='M 380 150 Q 365 165 350 150' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/><text x='365' y='180' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>+2</text><path d='M 290 150 Q 275 165 260 150' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/><text x='275' y='180' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>+2</text><path d='M 200 150 Q 185 165 170 150' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/><text x='185' y='180' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>+2</text><path d='M 110 150 Q 95 165 80 150' fill='none' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/><text x='95' y='180' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>+2</text></g></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：了解規則
steps.content: 小伊數數的起點是第一個數「20」，接著每一次的數字都會比前一個數字多加上 2。

steps.title: 步驟二：慢慢數出來！
steps.content:
中年級最好的方法就是直接畫出來、數出來！
第1個是20，第2個是22，第3個是24...
順著數下去：20, 22, 24, 26, 28, 30, 32, 34, 36, 38。
抵達第十個數字，答案就是 38。

Q08.title: 統計圖表判讀
Q08.questionText: 右圖是三年級學生製作的「最喜歡的一天」長條圖。請問最喜歡星期六或星期日的一共有多少名學生？
Q08.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 450 300' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><text x='225' y='20' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='18' fill='#1e293b'>一星期中最喜歡的一天</text><g font-size='16' fill='#64748b' text-anchor='end'><text x='35' y='55'>5</text><line x1='45' y1='50' x2='420' y2='50' stroke='#e2e8f0' stroke-width='1'/><text x='35' y='95'>4</text><line x1='45' y1='90' x2='420' y2='90' stroke='#e2e8f0' stroke-width='1'/><text x='35' y='135'>3</text><line x1='45' y1='130' x2='420' y2='130' stroke='#e2e8f0' stroke-width='1'/><text x='35' y='175'>2</text><line x1='45' y1='170' x2='420' y2='170' stroke='#e2e8f0' stroke-width='1'/><text x='35' y='215'>1</text><line x1='45' y1='210' x2='420' y2='210' stroke='#e2e8f0' stroke-width='1'/><text x='35' y='255'>0</text><line x1='45' y1='250' x2='420' y2='250' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/></g><line x1='45' y1='50' x2='45' y2='250' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='65' y='210' width='30' height='40' fill='#94a3b8'/><rect x='115' y='170' width='30' height='80' fill='#94a3b8'/><rect x='215' y='210' width='30' height='40' fill='#94a3b8'/><rect x='265' y='90' width='30' height='160' fill='#94a3b8'/><rect x='315' y='50' width='30' height='200' fill='#ef4444'/><text x='330' y='40' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' fill='#ef4444' font-size='16'>5人</text><rect x='365' y='130' width='30' height='120' fill='#0ea5e9'/><text x='380' y='120' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' fill='#0ea5e9' font-size='16'>3人</text><g font-size='16' font-weight='bold' fill='#1e293b' text-anchor='middle'><text x='80' y='275'>一</text><text x='130' y='275'>二</text><text x='180' y='275'>三</text><text x='230' y='275'>四</text><text x='280' y='275'>五</text><text x='330' y='275' fill='#ef4444'>六</text><text x='380' y='275' fill='#0ea5e9'>日</text></g></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：對齊刻度讀取人數
steps.content:
看圖表下方找到「星期六」，往上看柱子高度，對齊左邊的數字是 5。
找到「星期日」，柱子高度對齊左邊的數字是 3。

steps.title: 步驟二：計算總和
steps.content:
題目問的是「星期六或星期日」的總人數，也就是要把這兩天的喜歡人數加起來：
5 人 + 3 人 = 8 人。

Q09.title: 指針時鐘的時間差
Q09.questionText: 今天早上我去騎腳踏車。這些時鐘顯示了我的出發和結束時間。請問我騎了多少分鐘？
Q09.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 500 250' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><text x='130' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='20' fill='#1e293b'>出發時間</text><circle cx='130' cy='140' r='80' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='130' cy='140' r='4' fill='#1e293b'/><text x='130' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>12</text><text x='200' y='145' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>3</text><text x='130' y='215' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>6</text><text x='60' y='145' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>9</text><line x1='130' y1='140' x2='190' y2='140' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='130' y1='140' x2='95' y2='185' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round'/><rect x='90' y='235' width='80' height='30' rx='5' fill='#e2e8f0'/><text x='130' y='255' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='18'>7:15</text><path d='M 230 140 Q 250 120 270 140' fill='none' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='4' marker-end='url(#arr)'/><text x='370' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='20' fill='#1e293b'>結束時間</text><circle cx='370' cy='140' r='80' fill='#fff' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='370' cy='140' r='4' fill='#1e293b'/><text x='370' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>12</text><text x='440' y='145' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>3</text><text x='370' y='215' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>6</text><text x='300' y='145' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' font-weight='bold'>9</text><line x1='370' y1='140' x2='385' y2='85' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round'/><line x1='370' y1='140' x2='325' y2='165' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round'/><rect x='330' y='235' width='80' height='30' rx='5' fill='#e2e8f0'/><text x='370' y='255' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='18'>8:02</text></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：判讀時鐘的時間
steps.content:
看左邊的時鐘：短針剛過 7，長針指在 3，代表是 7點15分。
看右邊的時鐘：短針指在 8，長針剛過 12 兩小格，代表是 8點02分。

steps.title: 步驟二：分段計算經過的時間
steps.content:
為了方便計算，我們把時間切成兩段：
1. 從 7:15 到 8:00 (整點) 經過了 45 分鐘。
2. 從 8:00 到 8:02 經過了 2 分鐘。
總計時間：45 + 2 = 47 分鐘。

Q10.title: 序列排隊與相對位置
Q10.questionText: 小益跟小露與其他小朋友排成一列。小益排在從前面數來第 4 個，小露排在從後面數來第 4 個。這一列總共有 15 個小朋友。請問小益跟小露之間有幾個小朋友？
Q10.questionSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 550 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-full h-auto max-h-[280px]'><text x='30' y='30' font-weight='bold' fill='#64748b'>前面</text><text x='520' y='30' text-anchor='end' font-weight='bold' fill='#64748b'>後面</text><g transform='translate(10, 80)'><g id='kid'><circle cx='10' cy='0' r='6' fill='#cbd5e1'/><path d='M10,6 L10,20 M5,20 L15,20' stroke='#cbd5e1' stroke-width='3'/></g><use href='#kid' x='35'/><use href='#kid' x='70'/><circle cx='115' cy='-2' r='8' fill='#0ea5e9'/><path d='M115,6 L115,20 M108,20 L122,20' stroke='#0ea5e9' stroke-width='4'/><text x='115' y='-15' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>小益</text><text x='115' y='40' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='14' fill='#0ea5e9'>4</text><use href='#kid' x='140'/><use href='#kid' x='175'/><use href='#kid' x='210'/><use href='#kid' x='245'/><use href='#kid' x='280'/><use href='#kid' x='315'/><use href='#kid' x='350'/><circle cx='395' cy='-2' r='8' fill='#ef4444'/><path d='M395,6 L395,20 M388,20 L402,20' stroke='#ef4444' stroke-width='4'/><text x='395' y='-15' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='14' fill='#ef4444'>小露</text><text x='395' y='40' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='14' fill='#ef4444'>12</text><use href='#kid' x='420'/><text x='430' y='40' font-size='12' fill='#94a3b8'>倒3</text><use href='#kid' x='455'/><text x='465' y='40' font-size='12' fill='#94a3b8'>倒2</text><use href='#kid' x='490'/><text x='500' y='40' font-size='12' fill='#94a3b8'>倒1</text></g><path d='M 140 130 Q 255 160 260 160 Q 265 160 380 130' fill='none' stroke='#1e293b' stroke-width='3'/><text x='260' y='185' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold' font-size='18' fill='#1e293b'>中間有 ? 個人</text></svg>

steps.title: 步驟一：扣除法邏輯
steps.content:
隊伍的總人數是 15 人。我們可以把隊伍分成三個部分：
1. 小益與排在他前面的人（共有 4 人）。
2. 小露與排在她後面的人（共有 4 人）。
3. 夾在他們兩個人中間的人。

steps.title: 步驟二：執行計算
steps.content:
把總人數扣掉左右兩邊的人，剩下的就是中間的人數！
15 (總數) - 4 (左邊) - 4 (右邊) = 7。
